channel.title: MS Graph Registry Updates
channel.description: Real-time notifications for new Microsoft Graph Permissions

item.title: New Permission: ServiceHealth.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your tenant's service health information, without a signed-in user. Health information may include service issues or service health overviews. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: Channel.ReadBasic.All
item.description: Read all channel names and channel descriptions, without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: TeamworkAppSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the Teams app settings without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForTeam
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in teams the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: eDiscovery.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read eDiscovery objects such as cases, custodians, review sets and other related objects without the signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.description: Allows the application to create (register) printers on behalf of the signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: BrowserSiteLists.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write all browser site lists configured for your organization, without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's SPIFFE trust domains and child resources without a signed in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: BookingsAppointment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write Bookings appointments and customers, and additionally allows reading businesses, services, and staff without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: UserAuthMethod-PlatformCred.Read.All
item.description: (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: VirtualAppointment.Read.All
item.description: Allows the application to read virtual appointments for all users, without a signed-in user. The app must also be authorized to access an individual user's data by the online meetings application access policy. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: ChatMember.ReadWrite.WhereInstalled
item.description: Allows the app to add and remove members from all chats where the associated Teams application is installed, without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: TeamsTab.ReadWriteForTeam

item.title: New Permission: User-OnPremisesSyncBehavior.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and update the on-premises sync behavior of all users without a signed-in user. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: Files.ReadWrite

item.title: New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForTeam
item.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself to teams the signed-in user can access. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's approval items, approval requests and approval responses (created by the user or assigned to the user). Doesn't include permission to create, cancel, or update anything. (Detected on 2026-03-24)

item.title: New Permission: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Exchange
item.description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your organization's Exchange Online service, without a signed-in user. This includes reading, creating, updating, and deleting Exchange management role definitions, role groups, role group membership, role assignments, management scopes, and role assignment policies. (Detected on 2026-03-24)
